notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers flies out sharply to center fielder Evan Carter.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers grounds out, shortstop Corey Seager to first baseman Jake Burger.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Eugenio Suárez reaches on a fielder's choice. Sal Stewart to 2nd. Sal Stewart advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Josh Smith.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson grounds into a double play, shortstop Elly De La Cruz to first baseman Sal Stewart. Jake Burger out at 2nd. Joc Pederson out at 1st.
